description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 28 hrs 15 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 4 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, and his time was mostly in Java (48%), with Other (35%) and Markdown (16%) making up the rest. GitHub activity in the provided data shows no new commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
